hero.title: Find the right talent,
hero.subtitle: candydatos.com connects companies with the best candidates through intelligent job postings and AI-powered psychometric evaluations.

how.title: How does it work?
how.subtitle: A simple process for companies and candidates

steps_company.title: Create your company profile
steps_company.desc: Register and set up your company in minutes.

steps_company.title: Post job openings
steps_company.desc: Describe the position, salary range and requirements.

steps_company.title: Receive and filter applicants
steps_company.desc: Review applicants, assign recruiters and track progress.

steps_company.title: Evaluate with AI
steps_company.desc: Let Gemini AI assess fit and psychometric tests automatically.

steps_candidate.title: Create your profile
steps_candidate.desc: Register and upload your résumé — AI fills in the details.

steps_candidate.title: Browse open positions
steps_candidate.desc: Filter by salary, country, modality and keywords.

steps_candidate.title: Apply in a few clicks
steps_candidate.desc: Select your résumé; AI checks if you meet the requirements.

steps_candidate.title: Track your applications
steps_candidate.desc: See the status and recruiter feedback in real time.

features.title: Everything you need to hire smarter

items.title: AI Resume Analysis
items.desc: Gemini API extracts skills, experience and education from any résumé and suggests improvements.

items.title: Smart Fit Check
items.desc: Before a candidate applies, AI validates whether they meet the minimum requirements.

items.title: Psychometric Tests
items.desc: Big Five personality tests evaluated automatically by AI with detailed feedback.

items.title: Real-time Tracking
items.desc: Every step of the process is saved in real time — candidates can resume where they left off.

items.title: Multi-recruiter
items.desc: Invite colleagues to your company account and assign them to specific openings.

items.title: Analytics Dashboard
items.desc: Visualize the applicant funnel and compare personality profiles across candidates.

company.title: Company Portal
company.desc: Post jobs, manage applicants and evaluate candidates with AI.

candidate.title: Candidate Portal
candidate.desc: Find your next opportunity and apply with the help of AI.

cta.title: Get started today
cta.subtitle: Join the AI-powered recruitment platform. Free to get started.

job.loginSubtitle: Access full job details and apply in a few clicks
job.loginToSeeMore: Sign in to see the full details
job.loginFooter: By continuing you agree to candydatos terms of use

auth.selectRole: Select how you want to sign in

auth.enterAsCompanyDesc: Manage job posts, applicants and recruitment

jobs.title: Job Offers
jobs.empty: No job offers yet. Create the first one!
jobs.shareTitle: Check out this job on candydatos

pipeline.title: Selection pipeline
pipeline.rejectDesc: Write the reason for rejection. This message will be visible to the candidate in their application.
pipeline.rejectPlaceholder: E.g.: We're looking for a profile with more experience in...

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.bigFiveDesc: Average personality trait scores across all evaluated candidates.
analytics.eiDesc: Average EI dimension scores across all evaluated candidates.
analytics.interviewScoresDesc: Average score per category across all AI interviews conducted.

settings.title: Settings
settings.logoHint: Upload your company logo in PNG, JPG or SVG (max 2MB). It will be shown on job listings.

tests.title: Tests
tests.catalogDesc: These psychometric tests are available to all companies. Associate them with your job offers from the offer creation form.
tests.empty: No tests yet. Create the first one.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.completeToApply: Complete your profile to apply for jobs

resume.title: My Resumes
resume.name: Resume name
resume.empty: No resumes yet. Upload one to get started.
resume.emptyDesc: Upload your first resume as PDF so the AI can analyze it and give you recommendations.
resume.noAiData: AI analysis not available for this document.
resume.scoreDescription: This score is calculated based on the skills, experience, education, and structure detected in your document.
resume.noData: No information detected in this category.
resume.tipMoreSkills: Add at least 5 relevant technical skills to improve your visibility.
resume.tipFramework: Include specific frameworks (React, Angular, Vue) to stand out in searches.
resume.tipAddExperience: Add your work experience, including internships or personal projects.
resume.tipAddYears: Specify the duration of each experience so recruiters can assess your track record.
resume.tipAddEducation: Include your academic background and certifications.
resume.tipAddSummary: Add a 2-3 line professional summary at the top of your resume.
resume.tipAddPhone: Include your phone number so you can be contacted easily.
resume.tipAddEmail: Make sure to include a professional email address.

jobs.title: Job Openings
jobs.empty: No open positions match your search
jobs.selectJob: Select a job to see the details
jobs.notFound: This job doesn't exist or is no longer available

loader.title: Analyzing your profile

apply.selectResume: Choose a resume for this application
apply.fitFailed: You don't meet the minimum requirements

apply.successDesc: We will notify you of any updates.
apply.fitFailedTitle: You don't meet the requirements for this position
apply.fitFailedDesc: You can try with a different resume or explore other jobs that better match your profile.

interview.title: AI Interview
interview.description: An AI interviewer will ask you psychometric, emotional reasoning, and experience questions. The interview lasts 2 minutes.
interview.allowBrowser: Allow camera and microphone permissions in your browser
interview.connectingHint: Setting up the session, this will take a few seconds...
interview.analyzingHint: Our AI is evaluating your responses, expressions, and communication skills
interview.permissionError: Could not access camera or microphone. Check your browser permissions.
interview.genericError: An error occurred during the interview.
interview.devicesReady: Camera and microphone ready. You can start the interview!

applications.title: My Applications
applications.empty: You haven't applied to any offers yet

bigFive.name: Big Five (OCEAN)
bigFive.desc: Evaluates the 5 major personality traits: Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism.

ei.name: Emotional Intelligence
ei.desc: Evaluates the 5 EI dimensions: Self-Awareness, Self-Regulation, Motivation, Empathy, and Social Skills.
